rulings.Case Title: ANABELLE D. ABRIGO VS. COUNTRYWIDE INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 19, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. (BANA) and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S Motion to Dismiss With Prejudice DENY without prejudice. Appears plaintiff's counsel of record has been unable to practice law since September 16, 2012 (per Bar record); hence, moving party should serve notice of entry of order re demurrer to plaintiff. = (501/REQ)
